nasb.text: I do not nullify the grace of God, for if righteousness comes through the Law, then Christ died needlessly.”

esv.text: I do not nullify the grace of God, for if righteousness were through the law, then Christ died for no purpose.

cnv.text: 我不廢棄　神的恩；如果義是藉著律法而來的，基督就白白地死了。

ccb.text: 我不废弃上帝的恩典，倘若靠遵行律法可以成为义人，基督的死便毫无意义了。

csbs.text: 我不弃绝神的恩典，因为义如果是藉着律法而来的，那么，基督就白白地死了。
